title: GTWoodProcessing
description: A mod that integrates recipes related to wood processing and accommodates various mods.
body:
## List of wood processing only to be integrated
### Supported in v1.0.0
- [Gregtech Food Option](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregtech-food-option) 
- [Forestry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forestry)
- [Binnie's Mods Patched](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/binnies-mods-patched)
- [Thaumcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)

### Supported in v1.0.1
- [Advanced Rocketry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-rocketry)

### Supported in v1.0.2
- [Project: Vibrant Journeys](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-vibrant-journeys)

### Supported in v1.0.3
- [Plants](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/plants)

### Supported in v1.1.0
- [Extra Utilities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-utilities)
- [Integrated Dynamics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/integrated-dynamics)
- [Random Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/random-things)
- [Mystical World](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mystical-world)
- [Roots](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roots)
- [Rustic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rustic)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)

### Supported in v1.2.0
- [Nether Update Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nether-update-backport)
- [Ice and Fire: Dragons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragons)
- [Wizardry Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wizardry-mod)
- [Traverse Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/traverse-reforged)
- [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)

### Supported in v1.2.1
- [Natura](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natura)
- [Botania](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania)

# Some of the changes include:
- By installing the mods listed above, you can receive various linkages.
- **These major changes can also be controlled by CEu and GTWP cfg**

## [GregTech CE: Unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtech-ce-unofficial)
- Add HV and IV Chainsaw
- Several new machines will also be added
    - Addition of Sawmill (from [Impact-Core](https://github.com/GT-IMPACT/Impact-Core))
